zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Maude Hassard於1546年11月10日出生在英國多瑟特萊 雷吉時，她的父親John Hazard17歲，母親Mrs. John Hazard17歲。她和Rogerus\Roger MP Hill of Poundisford至少有1個女兒。她去世於1618年7月16日在她的家鄉享年71歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特比特明斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Maude Hassard于1546年11月10日出生在英国多瑟特萊 雷吉时，她的父亲John Hazard17岁，母亲Mrs. John Hazard17岁。她和Rogerus\Roger MP Hill of Poundisford至少有1个女儿。她去世于1618年7月16日在她的家乡享年71岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特比特明斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Hassard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (Fermanagh and Cavan): variant of   Hazard  .

variants.name: Hazard
meanings: English: Anglo-Norman French variant of   Hansard  .

English and French: nickname from Old French, Middle English hasard, hazard ‘game of dice’, perhaps given to a player at hazard, i.e. a gambler, trickster, or rascal. The word probably derives from Arabic az-zahr, from az, assimilated form of the definite article al, + zahr ‘die’. It appears to have been picked up in the Holy Land and brought back to Europe by Provençal crusaders.
English: possibly in some instances of Flemish origin, a nickname from Middle Dutch hasart ‘hare’.

nameMeanings.name: Mary

variants.name: Moira

nameMeanings.name: Maude

meanings: Variant of   Maud  , the usual spelling of the name in North America.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Maude Hassard was born on 10 November 1546, in Lyme Regis, Dorset, England, her father, John Hazard, was 17 and her mother, Mrs. John Hazard, was 17. She had at least 1 daughter with Rogerus\Roger MP Hill of Poundisford. She died on 16 July 1618, in her hometown, at the age of 71, and was buried in Pitminster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Maude Hassard est née le 10 novembre 1546, à Lyme Regis, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, John Hazard, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Mrs. John Hazard, avait 17 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Rogerus\Roger MP Hill of Poundisford. Elle est décédée le 16 juillet 1618, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Pitminster, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Maude Hassard am 10. November 1546 in Lyme Regis, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Hazard 17 und ihre Mutter Mrs. John Hazard 17. Sie hatte mit Rogerus\Roger MP Hill of Poundisford mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 16. Juli 1618 im Alter von 71 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Pitminster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Maude Hassard è nata il il 10 novembre 1546 nel Lyme Regis, Dorset, England, sua padre, John Hazard, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Mrs. John Hazard, aveva 17 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Rogerus\Roger MP Hill of Poundisford. Morì il 16 luglio 1618, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolta a Pitminster, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Maude Hassardが1546年11月10日にイギリスドールセトリメ レジスで生まれた時，父John Hazardは17歳，母Mrs. John Hazardは17歳であった。彼女はRogerus\Roger MP Hill of Poundisfordとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1618年7月16日に故郷で71歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトピトミンスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Maude Hassard(이)가 1546년 11월 10일 영국 도르세트 림 레지스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Hazard(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. John Hazard(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 Rogerus\Roger MP Hill of Poundisford(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1618년 7월 16일 그녀의 고향에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 피트민스터에 묻혔다.

pt.NOV 10, 1546–16 JULY 1618: 10 de novembro de 1546–16 de julho de 1618
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Maude Hassard nasceu em 10 de novembro de 1546, em Lyme Regis, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Hazard, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. John Hazard, tinha 17 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Rogerus\Roger MP Hill of Poundisford. Ela faleceu em 16 de julho de 1618, em sua cidade natal, com 71 anos, e foi sepultada em Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Maude Hassard родилась 10 ноября 1546 г. в местности лим регис, дорсет, Англия, её отцу по имени John Hazard было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. John Hazard, 17. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Rogerus\Roger MP Hill of Poundisford. Она умерла 16 июля 1618 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности питминстир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.NOV 10, 1546–16 JULY 1618: 10 de noviembre de 1546–16 de julio de 1618
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Maude Hassard nació el 10 de noviembre de 1546, en Lyme Regis, Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, John Hazard, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Mrs. John Hazard, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Rogerus\Roger MP Hill of Poundisford. Murió el 16 de julio de 1618, en su pueblo, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultada en Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
